name: Easyship
description: Unlock global e-commerce shipping with Easyship's automated tools and worldwide courier network.
longDescription: Easyship MCP server for global shipping and logistics. Compare rates across 550+ couriers, create shipments, buy labels, track packages, validate addresses, schedule pickups, and access shipping analytics across 200+ countries.
author: com.easyship
examplePrompts: Compare shipping rates from New York to Toronto
Create a shipment for this package
Schedule a pickup for tomorrow morning
